name: drawer
description: Edge-anchored dialog panel that slides in from a screen edge with CSS-only enter/exit motion

meta.name: Drawer
meta.description: Edge-anchored dialog panel that slides in from a screen edge with CSS-only enter/exit motion

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Whether the component is open on first render (uncontrolled).

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called with the next open state when it changes.

props.name: side
props.description: Edge the panel is anchored to. Drives the slide direction.

props.name: size
props.description: Panel size along its cross axis (width for start/end, height for top/bottom).

props.name: labels
props.description: Overrides for the component’s user-visible strings (i18n).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: swipeToDismiss
props.description: Allow dragging the header toward its edge to dismiss (opt-in).

examples.title: Bottom drawer with swipe-to-dismiss
examples.description: Dragging the header past a threshold toward the edge dismisses the panel.

whenToUse: A side or edge panel for navigation, filters, or detail views that needs full-height space
A modal surface that slides in and locks the page behind it while open
A controllable open/close panel where the parent owns the state via open/onOpenChange
whenNotToUse: A short yes/no confirmation — use AlertDialog
Small content anchored to a trigger element — use Popover
A gesture-driven, swipe-to-dismiss sheet — use Sheet

antiPatterns.why: A full edge panel with focus trap and scroll lock is overkill for a yes/no decision

related.name: Sheet
related.reason: Use Sheet when swipe/gesture dismissal is wanted; Drawer is a plain dialog panel

related.name: Modal
related.reason: Use a centered modal rather than an edge panel for focused decisions

intent.a11yRationale: Renders role="dialog" with aria-modal; the title labels it via aria-labelledby and the description via aria-describedby. FocusScope traps Tab focus and restores it on close; DismissableLayer handles Escape and outside-pointer dismissal.

flexibility.note: Limited to start | end | top | bottom — drives the slide direction and animation
Any children; the consumer owns the panel contents
